title: RNA-FRETools/rosettascripts: Release v1.0.0
author: Fabio Steffen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: rosettascripts comprises a set of helper scripts for homology and de novo modeling with Rosetta. A tutorial to get started with Rosetta and rosettascripts is available here Currently rosettascripts contains the following Python and Unix utilities: submitJobs : running multiple Rosetta jobs in parallel using a rna_denovo master file extract_pdb : extract decoys from a Rosetta silentfile and optionally concatenate them into a single multi-model PDB file pdb_resi_renumber : renumber the residues of a PDB file process_silentfile : remove non-standard residues from a silentfile
